# bind_summarised_results { #cdmconnector.bind_summarised_results }

```python
bind_summarised_results(*results)
```

Combine multiple SummarisedResult objects.

Re-assigns result_id values to avoid collisions.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type             | Description         | Default   |
|----------|------------------|---------------------|-----------|
| *results | SummarisedResult | Results to combine. | `()`      |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |
